spec_match.rationale: The tester installs the same-origin payment handler, runs PaymentRequest.show(), and reports the actual DOMException names for success, cancellation, internal handler failure, unsupported method, and missing activation paths.

interactive.rationale: Setup controls, support detection, five runnable scenario cards, a pre-149 legacy toggle, and a raw browser-result console all respond to user actions.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature index now names the expanded outcome set rather than only the original three scenarios.

edge_cases.rationale: The page now includes NotSupportedError and missing-activation probes, a legacy OperationError-to-AbortError display mode, and a raw error object readout.

design_system.rationale: Scenario titles use inline SVG icons with currentColor and the page uses shared CSS variables without raw hex color additions.

summary: The signal tester now covers the broader error-name surface while keeping the core API result visible through raw browser output and the legacy comparison toggle.
